name: Nanny's Honey Tea Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
Honey Bread:
1. Butter and flour an 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2 inches loaf pan.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. Divide tea between 2 small bowls.
4. Stir brown sugar into one until dissolved.
5. Stir honey into the other until blended.
6. In a medium bowl, combine flour and baking soda. Mix well.
7. Stir in sugar mixture until blended.
8. Quickly stir in honey mixture.
9. Pour batter into pan.
10. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes until skewer inserted in center comes out clean.
11. Cool in pan set on rack for 10 minutes.
12. Remove from pan and cool on rack.
Filling:
1. In a medium bowl, mash banana with lemon juice.
To Assemble:
1. Trim off ends of bread.
2. Cut remaining loaf into slices 1/2 inch thick.
3. Using a 1 3/4 to 2 inches cookie cutter, cut each slice into a floral shape.
4. With a sharp paring knife or very small round cookie cutter, cut a 1/2 inch round hole in the center of half the flowers, forming "doughnut" shapes.
5. Spread solid bread flowers with filling.
6. Top with "doughnut" slices.
7. Fill holes with chocolate sprinkles.
8. Serve at once.
